positive: A symmetrical, stylized arrangement of cosmic flora and mythical fauna, featuring geometric lotus flowers intertwined with celestial crescent moons and glowing nebulous vines. The style is a blend of Art Nouveau and Zapotec print, rendered with deep emerald greens, sapphire blues, and glowing gold accents. Central composition, perfect for apparel printing. High contrast silhouette against a textured midnight background. Intricate line work, flawless vector art look, highly detailed, symmetrical, centered, etching quality, graphic design illustration.
